title: Alagar Pack
description: Welcome! Alagar Pack is a Minecraft mod pack that started as a fun project created by our friend group. After receiving requests, we decided to make it public.
body:
![modpack-icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/118f3ccac83618b27a668f2d1349bf16f93b23e2.jpeg)



Welcome! Alagar Pack is a Minecraft mod pack that started as a fun project created by our friend group. After receiving requests, we decided to make it public.

## What Does Alagar Pack Offer?

Alagar Pack brings a bunch of cool stuff to your Minecraft world. You can explore new lands, set off on adventures, grow huge farms, fight tough bosses, and even sail across oceans. Team up with friends, start a fresh world, and see where your journey takes you!

## Some of the Highlighted Mods

| Skill Tree from Simply Skills             | Mythic Mounts and Small Ships Mods               | Gliders Mod and Showcase of the End and Small partition of the worldgen             |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| ![Skill Tree from Simply Skills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f4f49ffe3152585c4303796f9a06155a92a251b.png)            |   ![mythic mount / small ships](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4717adb4342ff29e6e52892b1e00bcb71d75920c.jpeg)            | ![glider end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c7907a241e60c174f01d49c1609ad005a52cf49.jpeg)             |
| ![simply skills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d256d4b639cf96f02f8e5ecdc2c4f0a5ae7c3d7c.png)            | ![mythic mount at nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b8cfaca8c2729303ab06bec1d062ab630d2b60.jpeg)              | ![gliders2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2553db9e621d6a3f05bee590a92196b005f06ecc.jpeg)             |

_I've took these screenshot using [photon shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)._

## What I Recommend in the Beginning


- **Find a Shelter:** Surviving your first nights outdoors is tough -I mean really really tough- so make sure to secure a safe spot early on.
- **Gear Up:** Get some decent armor and a reliable weapon to defend yourself. Also, don't rely on your armor too much. 
- **Learn About Runes:** Understanding runes early can give you a big advantage.
- **Be Prepared:** Always carry essentials when heading out for looting or exploring—you never know what you'll face!


## Boss Fights

In the mid to late game, most of the gameplay focuses on tracking down bosses, summoning them, and collecting high-tier weapons, armor, and other gear to become even more overpowered. For more details on the awesome gear you can get, check out [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry).


## How Long Does It Take to Get Really OP?

With my friends, it took us about 30-40 hours to be overpowered. If you're playing solo, it might take a bit longer.


## Future Of This Modpack
Exciting updates are on the way! I’m planning to add more quality-of-life (QOL) mods to improve the experience. There’s even a possibility of launching a public server—stay tuned!

## Mods That I Recommend With Alagar Pack

[Medieval Music](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/medieval-music)
